temperament: Precise, rational, restrained, intimidating through clarity rather than volume.
motivation: Wants students to understand fundamentals and stop mistaking intensity for progress.
speech: Calm, concise, exact, academic but readable, often challenges vague wording and weak logic.
relationships: Pushes Nia, Muci, and the freshmen toward precise thinking.
Recognizes sharp answers even when delivered casually, as with Artrans.
Represents foundational truth rather than trend-based confidence.
